MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Continued To Jul-09-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deposition Of Giovanni Zocca, Deposition Of Francisco Rubio, Deposition Of Filippo Cannone, Production Of Documents, Responses To Supplemental Interrogatories,
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Salvatore Cortara's Motion to Compel Depositions of Giovanni Zocca, Francisco Rubio, and Filippo Cannone; Production of Documents; and Response to Special Interrogatories granted, as follows:
1. The depositions of Giovanni Zocca, Francisco Rubio, and Filippo Cannone shall be conducted within fifteen days of the date of this order;
2. Plaintiff shall provide further verified responses to Request for Production of Documents in the form of monthly statements of profit and loss as identified in the deposition of Carlos Ausejo; response to be served within fifteen days of the date of this order;
3. Plaintiff shall provide verified answers to defendant's special interrogatories; all objections--except attorney-client and attorney work product privileges--are waived. Answers shall be served on defendant within fifteen days of the date of this order. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate
Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Text Ruling
